title: Single-user DNS cache issue

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Internal site will not load for one user
servicenow_seed.description: Caller cannot reach intranet.company.local. Other internal sites work and coworkers can access the page.

correct_steps: Clear browser cache or test another browser
rationale: One user with one internal site failing should be handled as local DNS/browser cache before Network Ops.
